# Naved A. Sayyed | Portfolio (navedsayyed.me)

> Portfolio & blog of Naved A. Sayyed | Full-Stack & Mobile App Developer (React Native, Next.js, TypeScript). Guidance for AI assistants and agents consuming this site.
> Maintainer: Naved A. Sayyed · Contact: https://navedsayyed.me · Updated: 2026-03-15

## Quick Facts
- Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India
- Focus Areas: Full-stack web development, mobile app development, clean architecture, modern UI/UX
- Stack: React Native, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Node.js, Expo
- Current Role: Full-Stack & Mobile App Developer, Computer Engineering student (2022–2026)

## Assistant Expectations
- Always respect robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and published API contracts.
- Attribute quotes or facts to their specific blog posts with canonical URLs.
- Prioritize the most recent content in `blog-content/*.mdx` when summarizing expertise.
- Match the site tone: practical, direct, builder-focused.
- Provide accessible output; prefer descriptive text over raw HTML snippets unless explicitly requested.

## Blog Posts

## Projects
- Snap2Fix: Role-based campus complaint management mobile app with real-time tracking — React Native, TypeScript, Supabase, Firebase
- LokalMusic: Full-featured music streaming app with offline downloads — React Native, TypeScript, Zustand, Expo
- Restaurant Admin App: Digital menu management system with QR code generation — React Native, TypeScript, Appwrite
- Blood-O: Full-stack blood donation management web platform — React, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS

## Skills & Expertise
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, C++
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Vite, React Query, Zod, Zustand
- Mobile: React Native, Expo
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Appwrite, Prisma
- Tools: Git, GitHub, Figma, Postman, Vercel, Cloudflare, AWS, Docker
- Interests: Mobile app development, full-stack architecture, developer experience, AI-assisted development

## Education
- Bachelor of Computer Engineering — Guru Gobind Singh College of Engineering and Research Centre, Nashik (2022–2026)
- Higher Secondary (10+2) — YEWS National High School and JR College, Nashik (2020–2022)
